title: Customizing components with the kubeadm API — APIServer flags
text:
For details, see the
reference documentation for kube-apiserver
.
Example usage:
apiVersion
:
kubeadm.k8s.io/v1beta4
kind
:
ClusterConfiguration
kubernetesVersion
:
v1.16.0
apiServer
:
extraArgs
:
-
name
:
"enable-admission-plugins"
value
:
"AlwaysPullImages,DefaultStorageClass"
-
name
:
"audit-log-path"
value
:
"/home/johndoe/audit.log"
